description: Webautomation is a web scraping software that allow newbies to easily compile data from the internet without having to spent time creating any code.
author: Keith D.
pros: WebAutomation has a Twitter Profile Scraper, eBay Listings Web Scraper, and Google Map Web Scraper. I simply click the Activate button and begin scraping various URLs for data.
cons: It has some glitches when the pages are loading.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Perfect for anyone getting into Web Scraping
description: Overall, the experience has been wonderful. Customer service is phenomenal and there is constant communication from the developers and the co-founders.
author: Emil L.
pros: The price is one of the most competitive in the industry and the pricing model is very transparent; the more data you extract, the more you pay. Even at hundreds of pages with tens of thousands of rows of data, it only comes up to just a few dollars a month.
cons: The sophistication of the software could be better but it is understandable that with such plug-n-play solutions, sophistication will always be the limitation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was good for learning web scraping data
author: Anuj K.
pros: The features , Scraping pre defined extractor
cons: Navigation flow could make user puzzled.I personally feel UI navigation could be improved
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Efficient Web Scraping Made Easy with Webautomation.io
author: Abhishek D.
pros: Webautomation.io has significantly streamlined our web scraping tasks, making data collection faster and more efficient than ever before. The user-friendly interface and intuitive design make it accessible even for those with limited technical expertise. The automation features are robust, allowing us to set up and run multiple scraping tasks simultaneously without any hassle.
cons: The don't have a freemium feature available at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: WebAutomation is a great service and this is strengthened by their incredible customer support.
author: Paul H.
pros: The platform is really easy to use and provides great value for our business
cons: There are currently no cons at this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: It's awesome, and the team keeps improving it at a rapid pace.
author: Florin T.
pros: It's very straightforward to set up, scales easily, and significantly cheaper than other alternatives. Plus, the team behind it is very attentive and if you need any custom development, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is attentive and eager to help.
cons: Nothing really. My team implemented it in less than a workday
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, I am really happy with the product. Serves it purpose and the customer service is great and ready to make changes to the current scrappers as requested.
author: Samarth G.
pros: Easy to use and works really well 9/10 times Great customer service.
cons: UI could be better. Loading times are annoying sometimes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and great support
author: Mrs S.
pros: WebAutomation is an easy to use and affordable tool for our needs. We scrape smaller pages with often a few weeks or months time in between, so the basic plan is perfect for us. The support team reacts super fast and is very friendly and helpful.
cons: It would be great to be able to set up really simple scrapers myself, but as the extractor concierce service is so affordable, I can't really complain about this fact.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Amazing Software coupled with EXCEPTIONAL Customer Support
description: Love the software immensely. Customer service is extremely responsive Victor is "Lion King" when it comes to customer support.
author: Desemal T.
pros: The web automation software is: - Intelligently designed - User friendly update - Great User Experience once you get the hang of things - Works so well with my business directory
cons: I think the 50-credits-per-row for Google maps is high when compared to the other web sources like superpages etc. It is not outrageous but I think it does drain away from your monthly allocation quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Brian M.
pros: There are very few tools in the market that can actually do what WebAutomation can do - brilliant engineering!
cons: Support helped walk me through how to use it which really helped.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Erik S.
pros: Simple to use, quick and supergood customer service
cons: I like mostly everything, of course, for a small entrepreneur it can become a little expensive to extract large amounts of data.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am able to extract data from Justdial and google maps.
author: Sonveer S.
pros: Web automation's just dial data extractor is good.
cons: User interface is not so friendly and its having multiple step that is not necessary
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Happy with the level of support they have been giving, and it's so easy to use for all ages.
author: Matthew D.
pros: The support system is very much active. Easy to Use A marketplace of extractors that others are using Beautiful and simple Graphical user interface Saves Time
cons: When you create a Concierge request it's important to say what you want in the headings of the columns.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: tony P.
pros: WebAutomation is the right tool for giving you competitor insights and available options to outperform them in any niche. You could use either as Chrome/Firefox extension add-on or Cloud-based tool. No matter you're in free trial, you'll get real-time data and customer service.
cons: I'd like to get more than a $25 credit for my trial
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: priit L.
pros: Excellent support, i asked for personalized scraper, and they created with less then 24 hours, support has been amazing, and service is really easy to use, easy to operate, overall brilliant
cons: none till today, everything works fine, no complaints
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Super good support and good service
author: Sietse S.
pros: They are flexible and the price is really good
cons: Sometimes crawlers stop working and need updates , the fixes are fast it is only a small problem
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Tarique A.
pros: There different ways to extract the site. Already defined PDEs
cons: Some Cosmetics Bugs are there which I pointed out in WebAutomation
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I recommend working with web-automation.io to save yourself a lot of time and effort!
author: Nwando E.
pros: Working with web-automation.io has allowed me to focus on other aspects of growing my business while automating a significant percentage of the work. It is easy to use and has saved my business a lot of time. The team also took the time to talk to me in detail understand my business needs and then they customized a service that works perfectly for me! They are a life saver!
cons: I will continue to use web-automation.io!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So happy to use this as part of our business going forward.
author: Angela S.
pros: I have been very happy with this software - it is so easy to use!
cons: Ideally, if I was to ask for it to be rebuilt I would ask for separate boxes for each category
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Scott S.
pros: Lots of quality leads and excellent customer service
cons: I can't think of anything negative because the customer service is very responsive and will help you get what you need
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great product and great customer service
author: Rotimi O.
pros: The ease of use and the ability to pre set regular tasks/data extractions that can run overnight and be ready for when you get in to work.
cons: The report on the performance of the extraction doesn’t really add value for my needs
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: luca P.
pros: Veloce, semplice e intuitvo. Fa perfettamente quello che promette di fare! Ottimo
cons: niente da segnalare. non ho trovato problemi
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ease of use for price data collection
author: Christian B.
pros: Ability to collect required pricing data from virtually all websites once the set up is completed. Set up is relatively easy. The ability to also harvest the image links to the products of interest is commendable. The CSV file can be transferred to Minitab and Excel.
cons: It will be nice to take on multiple sites at the same time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Soham S.
pros: This tool is the best tool for scrapping data from ecommerce website. It givers you lot of option to scrap the data from their
cons: The options are not easily discoverable.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
